purpose: Prebuilt analytics reports for the space

issue_analysis.name: Average Age Report
issue_analysis.description: Average age of unresolved issues for a project or filter to monitor backlog health.

issue_analysis.name: Created vs. Resolved Issues Report
issue_analysis.description: Maps created vs resolved issues over time to see if the backlog is growing or shrinking.

issue_analysis.name: Pie Chart Report
issue_analysis.description: Pie chart of issues grouped by a specified field.

issue_analysis.name: Recently Created Issues Report
issue_analysis.description: Issues created over a period of time and how many were resolved.

issue_analysis.name: Resolution Time Report
issue_analysis.description: Length of time taken to resolve a set of issues.

issue_analysis.name: Single Level Group By Report
issue_analysis.description: Issues grouped by a particular field for a filter.

issue_analysis.name: Time Since Issues Report
issue_analysis.description: For a date field, maps issues against the date that field was set.

forecast_and_management.name: Time Tracking Report
forecast_and_management.description: Original and current time estimates for issues in the project.

forecast_and_management.name: User Workload Report
forecast_and_management.description: Time estimates for all unresolved issues assigned to a user across projects.

forecast_and_management.name: Version Workload Report
forecast_and_management.description: Time estimates for unresolved issues in a version, broken down by user and issue.

other.name: Workload Pie Chart Report
other.description: Issues for a project or filter as a pie chart.
